communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

Dear New York State Division of Human Rights,
My first case, 10248080 was filed with NYSDHR on October 31, 2024  It is my understanding that most cases are resolved within 200 days.  I am aware that my case is not typical, complicated and that there are multiple retaliation complaints that extend the required time.  I respect the Division's diligence in investigating my matter.  The case is 506 days into the first case so I am requesting a formal status update and case information for the following matters:
Case No. 10248080
Case No. 10241390
Case No. 10256572
Case No. 10260463
It is my understanding that I am entitled to any information contained in the investigations file.  For each of the above-referenced cases, I am requesting the following:
Current status of the investigation or processing stage
Name and title of the assigned investigator(s) or staff currently responsible for each case
A copy of the case file, including all documents, correspondence, and materials maintained by the Division, to the extent permitted under New York law
If any portion of the requested file cannot be disclosed, please provide what information can be released.
Thank you for your work and dedication in this case.  I am also filing a FOIA in case it is needed to release the information.
I am also requesting any information allowable by law to be released regarding any case with the Division of Human Rights pertaining to the following agency: 
Central Conference of American Rabbis - OH Registration #26991
EIN: 13-1769747
NY State Registration Number - 05-99-38
Recently changed address:
183 Madison Ave #1504
New York, NY 10016
Address listed with Charities Bureau:
355 LEXINGTON AVE 8th Floor, null
NEW YORK , NY 10017

The requested documents will be made available to the general public free of charge as part of the public information service at MuckRock.com.
I request that I be properly classified as a news media requester. I am a complainant and a writer for the Times of Israel and I am requesting this information in that editorial capacity.  The Times of Israel is widely recognized for its reporting, publishing regular features on issues of public interest and importance.  You may view my articles at the address listed:  https://blogs.timesofisrael.com/author/julie-guilfoyle/.  If you have any questions about my media status, please contact me.
Sincerely,
Julie Guilfoyle

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Julie Guilfoyle

title: Ohio & New York Foia Logs (New York Attorney General's Charities Bureau)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

To Whom It May Concern:
Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law (Public Officers Law, Article 6, §§ 84–90) and Ohio Revised Code §149.43 (Ohio Public Records Act), I hereby request the following records:
A log of public records requests submitted to the New York Charities Bureau and the New York Secretary of State,  The Ohio Attorney General and the Ohio Secretary of State, listing the date of request, the requester's name, the requester's organizational affiliation, a description of the request, the date the request was filled. and a list of responsive documents.  I would like this information for the period from January 2018 to the present.
If any portion of the requested records is withheld, I request that all reasonably segregable, non-exempt portions be provided with redactions. 
The requested documents will be made available to the general public free of charge as part of the public information service at MuckRock.com.
I request that I be properly classified as a news media requester. I am a complainant and a writer for the Times of Israel and I am requesting this information in that editorial capacity.  The Times of Israel is widely recognized for its reporting, publishing regular features on issues of public interest and importance.  You may view my articles at the address listed:  https://blogs.timesofisrael.com/author/julie-guilfoyle/.  If you have any questions about my media status, please contact me.
In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request be filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.  If there is a large cost, then as an alternative, I request for the records to be made available for inspection.
Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request.
Sincerely,
Julie Guilfoyle

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Julie Guilfoyle
